_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of tools for testing the robustness and resilience of software products and solutions.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of program management frameworks (PMI, SAFe, Agile) and how they are adapted for data and AI programs that involve technical uncertainty, iterative development, and cross-functional dependencies.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.470), AI-K-008 (AI, cosine: 0.470).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.483). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [products, resilience, robustness, software, solutions, testing] vs WIDAI-only terms [adapted, agile, ai, cross, data, dependencies] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.903, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.048 — the DCWF element's 14 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:73.0%, C:27.0%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of tools for testing the robustness and resilience of software product" vs "Knowledge of program management frameworks (PMI, SAFe, Agile) and how they are a" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.490 ≈ STS 0.483 (gap 0.007). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.8%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [products, resilience, robustness, software, solutions, testing]. WIDAI-only: [adapted, agile, ai, cross, data, dependencies].
